subject: Re: hull and deck of Nautica
body:
no tanks

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> For ordering, we need to determine now the color of
> the deck and the  hull.  
> Craig told me that Nautica said they will match any
> swatch you give  them, but 
> Nautica and Craig recommend white for a few reasons,
> including, will  not get 
> as hot as a color and if patching is ever required,
> will be much easier  to 
> keep the color of the hull/deck surface and the
> patch consistent.
>  
> Please advise what color I should tell Craig. 
> Thanks.
>  
> Darren
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
no tanks

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

For ordering, we need to determine now the color of
the deck and the hull.
Craig told me that Nautica said they will match any
swatch you give them, but
Nautica and Craig recommend white for a few reasons,
including, will not get
as hot as a color and if patching is ever required,
will be much easier to
keep the color of the hull/deck surface and the
patch consistent.

Please advise what color I should tell Craig.
Thanks.

Darren
